provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Let's build the rate limiter with strict red-green-refactor.
RED: write one failing test for the first rate-limit behavior.
GREEN: add the minimal code to make that test pass.
Refactor only once the bar is green, then repeat for the next behavior.
